commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And come and stand before me in this house, which is called by my name, and say, We are delivered to do all these abominations. Hebrew also, "although "(Sa; Grotius) "to perform "(Chaldean; Montanus) or "by doing. "God must surely approve of our conduct, since we are unmolested. Thomas Aquinas; Lyranus) But the Vulgate seems preferable, and the people attribute their success to idols, chap. , and 2 Paralipomenon xxviii.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
